description: This class includes the gathering of wild growing non-wood forest products.
includes: gathering of wild growing materials: mushrooms, truffles; berries; nuts; balata and other rubber-like gums; cork; lac and resins; balsams; vegetable hair; eelgrass; acorns, horse chestnuts; mosses and lichens
excludes: management of forests for growing of these products, see 0210
growing of mushrooms or truffles, see 0113
growing of berries or nuts, see 0125
